extortion.description: eximbankja.com zoominfo.com/c/exim-bank/101959142 Exim Bank Jamaica provides innovative trade financing solutions, short and medium-term loans, and advisory services aimed at fostering business growth. The bank is dedicated to supporting the productive sector by offering competitively-priced financial products tailored to meet the needs of its clients. Their services include working capital financing, trade credit insurance, and specialized loans for sectors such as tourism and renewable energy.
